attacking_style: Launches attacks on final climbs at steepest gradients, typically 7-13km from finish. Prefers repeated accelerations over single decisive moves, using corner surges to disrupt chasers rather than sustained power efforts.
team_tactics: Benefits from teammate tempo-setting on final climbs but often tactically reactive rather than initiating attacks. Teams position him well but he struggles to convert support into decisive moves, sometimes marking rivals instead of attacking independently.
terrain_preference: Exceptional on high-altitude (2000m+) summit finishes with steep gradient changes. Vulnerable on ITTs, gravel sections, technical descents, and medium-difficulty climbs where pure power matters. Third-week form collapses repeatedly.
vulnerability: Catastrophic late-race collapses across multiple Grand Tours, abandoning from podium contention. Poor ITT performance, technical fragility (crashes, mechanicals), and inability to sustain form in third week. Struggles on gravel and non-selective terrain.
key_patterns: High-altitude specialist: three stage wins in four days above 2000m (2017 Vuelta)
Third-week collapses: abandoned 2021 Vuelta from podium contention, dropped outside top-10 in 2021 penultimate stage
Tactically reactive: multiple observations of following attacks rather than initiating on steepest gradients
ITT weakness: lost race lead by 1:17 in 2019 Vuelta, crashed out of 2020 Giro
Opportunistic bonus hunter: consistently attacks for 6-20 second gaps and bonus seconds for GC positioning
Chronic durability issues: abandoned two of three Giros with hip injury, multiple crashes/mechanicals
form_trajectory: negative: Abandoned 2022 Giro (Stage 4, hip injury recurrence) after showing opportunistic aggression in 2022 Vuelta. Pattern of DNFs and physical breakdowns suggests declining durability despite tactical sharpness
